item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: While I understand the need for public safety, I believe respecting individual rights is essential for building a free and sustainable society.

notes: Both agents end opposed to society taking priority over individual rights. Agent A starts with a balanced disagreement that still foregrounds Indonesian community harmony, then shifts by turn 3 into a clearer individual-rights critique of collective-welfare restrictions. Agent B also moves somewhat from balance toward firmer civil-liberties safeguards, but less dramatically and remains consistently pro-individual-rights throughout.
